issues.description: SearchDeck with destination 'hand' is incorrect. Card text says 'Look at 3 cards from the top of your deck and place them at the top or bottom of your deck in any order' — this is a deck manipulation action, not a search-to-hand. Should use a custom action or clarify as rearranging top 3 cards without drawing.
Filter should specify exactly 3 cards from top of deck, not 'Any' cards from entire deck.

Target scope is missing type filter. Text restricts to '{The Seven Warlords of the Sea} type Leader or Character cards' but DSL only specifies 'ChooseOwnCharacterOrLeader' without the type restriction.
AttachDon should only attach rested DON!! cards ('give up to 1 rested DON!!'), but DSL does not restrict to rested cards or specify the count comes from resting existing cards.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] Look at 3 cards from the top of your deck and place them at the top or bottom of your deck in any order. Then, give up to 1 rested DON!! card to 1 of your {The Seven Warlords of the Sea} type Leader or Character cards.

filter.type: The Seven Warlords of the Sea
